mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO WATCH_HISTORY_TBL (USER_ID, MOVIE_ID, TITLE, POSTER_PATH, GENRES) VALUES ( #{USER_ID}, #{MOVIE_ID}, #{TITLE}, #{POSTER_PATH}, #{GENRES} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE WATCH_DATE = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WATCH_HISTORY_TBL WHERE USER_ID = #{USER_ID}
